params.name: Nethrone Sculpture
params.description: Upon learning of Nethrone's demise, Earth's Will had a batch of statues crafted in the likeness of its head. One purpose was to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe, and the other was to gift these to the distinguished Travelers, allowing them to share in the Joy of victory!
